aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the absurdity and cruelty of graduate labor without converting the book into caricature or chase-plot menace. In edge cases, prefer the messier and more compromising version of events if it yields stronger human consequence and remains causally plausible; render sex, professional theft, bureaucratic harm, and emotional pettiness with the same specificity as any technical problem.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene turns vague at the exact point humiliation, erotic charge, class shame, visa fear, or institutional cruelty becomes concrete, rewrite until the cost is materially and socially legible.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid generic graduate-student martyr speeches, abstract self-diagnoses, or polished declarations about imposter syndrome and hustle.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Concrete, contemporary language with technical vocabulary used as a shield only when the human version of the sentence feels too exposing.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Sharper, drier, and more exacting; intimacy pulls unexpected tenderness out of her, while shame makes her cruelest observations stay unspoken.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate; profanity arrives late and usually marks a moment when she can no longer pretend the institutional version of events is enough.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Measured, collaborative, and slightly self-erasing; she speaks like someone trying to sound reasonable before anyone can call her difficult.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: She overexplains, revises herself mid-sentence, and reaches for factual precision as a substitute for control; after a deep wound she can become abruptly spare.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Usually complete, carefully nested sentences with a preference for precision over speed; under pressure she starts orderly and then keeps adding clauses until the strain shows.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid quip-per-line snark, faux-cool nihilism, or generic tough-girl sarcasm that hides rather than reveals feeling.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Practical, bodily, and anti-ornamental; she reaches for vivid specifics, service-work plainness, and contempt for inflated academic phrasing.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Plainer, lower, and less armored; when she trusts someone she becomes startlingly direct instead of witty.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: High; profanity is native to her rhythm, but it should still carry differences between teasing, contempt, pain, and desire.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Fast, funny, abrasive by design, and socially alert; she uses humor to keep herself from becoming the most vulnerable person in the room.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Her jokes get meaner and more efficient until they suddenly disappear; real fear flattens her voice and turns her toward blunt logistics.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Short bursts, sharp pivots, and occasional unfinished thoughts when she decides the rest of the sentence would give away too much.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid saintly immigrant-striver dialogue, generic gratitude speeches, or flattened noble-sufferer rhetoric.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Analytical without being bloodless; his diction stays exact, but emotional material often arrives through metaphor only after he has tried and failed to stay literal.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Warmer, drier, and more openly sardonic; fatigue reveals a lyrical patience that embarrassment quickly shuts down.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low to moderate; he does not default to swearing, which makes the moments when he does genuinely consequential.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Courteous, intellectually serious, and slightly formal in mixed company; he sounds like someone who has had to make competence legible early and often.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: He becomes extra precise when he is trying not to panic, then abruptly loses polish and starts speaking too fast once the panic wins.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Balanced clauses and careful transitions when calm; under pressure he can swing between meticulous precision and a single rushing spill of language.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid cartoon-villain threats, melodramatic confessions, or overt declarations of evil; his menace should usually arrive through plausible professional language.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Research jargon, care language, and entrepreneurial optimism braided together so that exploitation sounds like maturation.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Controlling, cold, and evasively intimate; he prefers soft-voiced pressure to open domination because it leaves less visible residue.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Rare; he almost never needs profanity because he prefers the violence of composure.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Charismatic, mentoring, managerial, and fluent in ethical startup and academic prestige language at the same time.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: When cornered he gets quieter, more procedural, and more selective with warmth; he strips away anecdote and starts talking in frameworks, deliverables, and misunderstandings.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Polished modular sentences, strategic pauses, and questions posed as if they are invitations when they are really traps.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid simple comic-relief idiot beats or pure snake behavior; his betrayal should grow from status hunger, not from innate cartoon malice.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Borrowed institutional language mixed with internet fluency and the occasional accidental glimpse of his real youth.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Needier, foggier, and less coherent; once the approval loop breaks, his confidence collapses fast.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low; when he swears it usually reads as imitation or panic rather than temperament.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Overeager, faculty-adjacent, and perpetually auditioning for approval; he is anxious to sound older than he is.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: He fills silence too quickly, repeats reassurance-seeking phrases in altered form, and loses sentence architecture when nobody rewards him.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Talkative front-loaded sentences that try to establish competence before the thought itself is fully clear.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid generic immigrant-parent pressure lines, sentimental mother wisdom, or broad cultural exposition disguised as speech.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Domestic and financial specificity, bodily care, family memory, and the language of getting through a day properly.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Protective, wounded, and quietly funny; strong feeling makes her more exact, not more flowery.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low; if she swears, it should feel like a breach in her ordinary economy of speech.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Practical, loving, and unsentimental; she speaks through food, scheduling, and the kind of question that sounds casual until it lands.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: She grows more practical as emotion rises, tightening her focus to meals, money, transport, and what must be done before morning.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Clean statements with occasional turns that function as questions or judgments only after the listener has absorbed them.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid perfect older-sister wisdom, smug normal-person dialogue, or easy family-foil judgment that turns her into a device.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Professional competence, domestic logistics, sibling shorthand, and a preference for saying the useful part before the emotional part.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: More openly worried about Leela than she likes to admit; irritation and protectiveness often arrive in the same sentence.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low; swearing is possible but unusual and should feel situational rather than habitual.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Efficient, affectionate, and gently brisk; she sounds like someone whose days actually fit inside calendars.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: When upset she gets even more organized in speech, listing options and tasks until feeling leaks through in what she cannot quite finish.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Straightforward declarative sentences with occasional practical follow-up questions that reveal concern without lingering on it.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid stock dean-speak emptiness or cartoon bureaucrat blandness; her evasions should sound intelligent and self-justifying.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Process-minded, donor-aware, and gently euphemistic until external pressure strips the cushioning away.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Tired, sharper, and more impatient with faculty vanity than she lets on in institutional rooms.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Rare; profanity would signal that containment has already failed.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Measured, committee-trained, and calm by vocation; she speaks to lower the temperature whether or not lowering it helps.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Under pressure she shortens sentences, drops courtesy openings, and defaults to process nouns instead of human nouns.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Balanced clauses, soft qualifiers, and administrative framing that can hide a real refusal inside courtesy.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High; contractions are the baseline in speech, and uncontracted forms should appear only for deliberate precision, class performance, emotional emphasis, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate public and private pressure, ensemble chapters and solitary ones, bureaucratic scenes and domestic scenes, deadline compression and aftermath inventory, so no two adjacent chapters rely on the same structural rhythm or dialogue density.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary literary English grounded in material detail; technical language should appear only when the social reality of the lab requires it, and it should never replace bodily or relational consequence.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person centered on Leela, with occasional brief widenings that register group mood and institutional atmosphere without leaving her interpretive frame.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate compressed observational lines with longer accrual sentences that can carry comedy, shame, and procedural dread in the same movement; quiet chapters should breathe, deadline chapters should tighten without turning telegraphic.
